title: Bigfoot: The Curse of Blood Mountain
original_title: Bigfoot: The Curse of Blood Mountain
overview: Two friends, Riggs and Decker embark on a search for proof of Bigfoot's existence. They soon find out that the real question is not if he exists, but why.
